findings.description: List-of-blocks tool_result content shape never tested — every fixture builds inner content as a plain string, so the `elif isinstance(content, list)` join branches in _exit_evidence (1597-1599), _classify_authorization_start (1634-1636), _workspace_state (1754-1756) never execute; real transcripts frequently deliver content:[{type:text,...}]. A regression in any join silently degrades exit-code parsing, denial/cancel classification, workspace-state coverage while suite stays green. Criticality 7.

START_UNKNOWN final fallthrough (result present, is_error false, no exit code, no terminal text -> START_UNKNOWN, line 1676) untested; a regression flipping empty-successful-result into a launch would inflate the headline numerator unnoticed. Criticality 5.
Analyzer CLI fail-closed arms untested: main() path-validation failure -> exit 2 (2872-2877), registry-load failure -> exit 2 (2901-2906). Criticality 4.
Three alternate _classify_source_status arms uncovered: absent metadata.json legacy arm (1284), metadata non-dict (1275-1276), unreadable stop-log beside empty transcript (1316). Criticality 4.
join_confidence first CONFIDENCE_EXACT arm (equal source_event_id, 2022) unpinned though docstring positions it as the pinned reference contract. Criticality 4.
Exporter minor arms: malformed job-row drop counting (101-102), gh spawn OSError/Timeout arm (181-183), --workflows matched-zero warning (364). Criticality 3.

compute_source_snapshot_hash cloud arms (2686-2688) never execute; sample-seed determinism unverified with cloud rows; generate_report 'cloud coverage: available' line (2728) never rendered in a test. Criticality 3.
_cleanup edge arms: absent out_dir -> (0,0) (2832), top-level plain-file removal (2852). Criticality 2.

note: 164 tests green; ~96% analyzer line coverage; no test-quality issues; strong positive observations.
